verbatim_quote: And to answer this, we're going to train various external interpretability techniques, which are going to be the orange, green, and red lines and the self-models technique. And we're going to look at what happens when we expose them to varying amounts of training data.
gloss: [PREDICTION] And to answer this, we're going to train various external interpretability techniques, which are going to be the orange, green, and red lines and the self-models technique. And ...
